page_title: Attack on Titan: Special Selection! One-Panel Oogiri Book
text:
is a book that contains oogiri-style one-panel comedic cartoons obtained by taking single panels from the original Attack on Titan manga and changing their text so as to elicit hilarity. This book contains a collection of entries selected between the over 10.000 that were submitted by fans on the "au Smart Pass", "Sugotoku", and "Mingeki" mobile apps. It also contains a new short story titled .
